import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from "react"; import "./home.css"; // copy your CSS (or adjust path). Keep only component-specific styles here. import "../styles/home.css"; export default function Home({ rooms = [], photos = [] }) { // slider state (1-based like your original page indicator) const [index, setIndex] = useState(1); const slideCount = 3; const autoPlayRef = useRef(null); useEffect(() => { // auto advance every 6s (optional) autoPlayRef.current = setInterval(() => { setIndex((i) => (i >= slideCount ? 1 : i + 1)); }, 6000); return () => clearInterval(autoPlayRef.current); }, []); // Intersection Observer for fade animations (same behavior as original) useEffect(() => { const observer = new IntersectionObserver( (entries) => { entries.forEach((entry) => { if (entry.isIntersecting) { entry.target.classList.add("show"); } }); }, { threshold: 0.1 } ); document .querySelectorAll(".fade-in, .fade-up, .fade-left, .fade-right") .forEach((el) => { if (!el.closest(".hero-wrap") && !el.closest(".nav")) { observer.observe(el); } }); return () => observer.disconnect(); }, []); // slide background helper (use files in public/assets/images/) const slideBackground = (n) => { const urls = { 1: "/assets/images/glamp1.jpg", 2: "/assets/images/glamp2.jpg", 3: "/assets/images/glamp3.jpg", }; return { backgroundImage: `url('${urls[n]}')` }; }; const goPrev = () => setIndex((i) => (i <= 1 ? slideCount : i - 1)); const goNext = () => setIndex((i) => (i >= slideCount ? 1 : i + 1)); return (
